notes: sparse child: isolates the unconditional 5-taps/step floor
full-density child: no early-continue, full lighting per step
defaults, clicks=0 (wavelets gated OFF), circle child
sparse glyph child: most pixels exit early (best case)
full-coverage child: interior rays never exit (worst case)
contour=1: confirms cost is gate-shaped, not magnitude-shaped
contour=0: whole edge-distance raycast gated OFF
UI-thread uniform cost (~93 setFloats): read build, not raster
child-capture tax at full window size
harness floor: no shader, time driver running
